h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

scored.recoheredEarlier: Prior ability goes in as the confound because it shows causal direction has not been established
scored.statedInsightEvidence: Oh, I get it now: correlation alone does not prove cause.
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner would continue to use the confound as a demonstration that causal direction is not established.
